must_have_quals: Minimum 3 years of professional web development experience, Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science or related field, Strong proficiency in React.js and related libraries (Redux, React Router, Zustand, Recoil), Expertise in PHP and frameworks like Laravel or Symfony; experience with Perl or Python a plus, Solid understanding of web standards, APIs, REST, XML, and JSON, Strong SQL skills and experience with relational databases (MySQL preferred), Effective communicator with strong collaboration skills, Strong problem-solving abilities; adaptable, proactive, and ownership-driven, Commitment to code quality, architecture, and documentation
preferred_quals: Experience with Agile methodologies, Familiarity with design patterns
core_responsibilities: Work within an agile, cross-functional team to deliver organizational objectives, Develop user-facing features using React.js and related libraries (e.g., Redux, React Router, Zustand, Recoil), Make sound design decisions and tradeoffs within the codebase, Contribute across the codebase with minimal guidance, Build reusable, efficient, and scalable components and front-end libraries, Translate UI/UX wireframes into responsive, high-quality code, Use user empathy to inform design and development decisions, Collaborate with QA and advise on regression risks, Proactively fix issues and address technical debt, Ensure cross-browser compatibility and consistent visual design
job_summary: ModMed is a healthcare technology company focused on modernizing the healthcare experience through innovative software solutions. They are seeking a FullStack Software Engineer to join their Product Development team, responsible for designing and developing healthcare software systems using technologies like React.js and PHP.
